title: Qualify signed-device behavior and exact-final performance
outcome: The immutable final development candidate is measured on approved signed devices for Keychain/SIWA, APNs/widgets/extensions, audio/background/interruption, real-network transitions, memory, energy, launch, scrolling, images, downloads, and operator-observed VoiceOver behavior; every result is passed, failed, or blocked without a release claim.

prohibitedPaths.reason: program package lanes consume but do not mutate the plan

interfaceContracts: Qualification is bound to exact candidate SHA, device class, OS, configuration, scenario, budget, samples, and artifact.
A performance regression returns to its owning feature package; this lane does not patch production source.
Each authorization domain is independently resumable; blocked sublanes do not erase or prevent unaffected evidence, but package completion requires every AC to pass.
Credentials, identifiers, private content, and raw network bodies never enter evidence.

estimate.estimateMeaning: minutes/maxSublaneMinutes is the maximum uninterrupted focused window; totalMinutes discloses the four independently resumable qualification sublanes.
splitIf: more than 12 files or 1 primary root is required
a second high-contention lock is required

fallbacks: GitHub connector or gh read-only evidence

required: remaining blockers and next safe action
handoff.splitOrReassignWhen: After one bounded status request, interrupt only if no material evidence; reassign untouched disjoint work, never a second writer on the same paths.

reasons: signed Keychain and Sign in with Apple
APNs, widgets, extensions, and background execution
real-network transitions, memory, energy, and exact-final performance
operator-observed VoiceOver focus, order, announcements, and recovery

backend.dependency: Runtime checks use an approved nonproduction environment only. Unknown deployed revision or missing authority blocks the applicable claim; source merge is not deployment.

git.prTitle: WP-DEVICE-01: Qualify signed-device behavior and final performance

mergePredicate: all acceptance criteria and invariants pass on exact head
fresh required local validation passes on exact head
independent final-diff review has no unresolved P0/P1/P2
all applicable required GitHub checks succeed
PR is conflict-free and branch protection/review requirements hold
base/head drift is reconciled and invalidated gates rerun
backend deployment and owner/device gates are truthful
PR is not #117 and frozen branch is untouched
cleanupPredicate: GitHub records merge and target contains reviewed change
worktree has no live PID/open file
worktree is clean with no unmerged commit
remove with git worktree remove, never rm -rf
delete only merged package-owned local/remote branch when not a stack dependency
reverify target ancestry, worktrees, and primary checkout fingerprint
releaseBoundary: Development qualification only. No deployment, App Store, TestFlight, signing/release action, PR #117 mutation, or release-readiness claim.
